title: My wallet
subtitle: Manage the receiving bank accounts used to generate transfer QR codes.

empty.title: Empty wallet
empty.body: The wallet (receiving accounts & QR codes) is a Premium feature. Premium is granted manually by an administrator — contact your operator to unlock it.
empty.premiumBody: Add your first bank account to start generating transfer QR codes.

delete.title: Delete account {{bank}}?
delete.body: This bank account will be removed from your wallet.
delete.bodyDefault: This is the default account. After deletion, the most-recently-added remaining account becomes the default; if this is the last one, the wallet will be empty.

premium.title: Managing payment methods is a Premium feature
premium.info: You can still view your saved accounts, but adding, editing, setting a default, or deleting requires Premium. Premium is granted manually by an administrator.
premium.gateBody: Generating transfer QR codes is available on Premium only. Premium is granted manually by an administrator — contact your operator to unlock it.

qr.imageAltExpense: VietQR code for transferring the amount of this expense. The account details are right below.
qr.imageAltEvent: Composite VietQR code for settling the event's debts. The account details are right below.
qr.noAccountBody: Add a bank account to your wallet to generate a transfer QR code.
qr.noDebtTitle: Nobody owes anything in this event
qr.noDebtBody: Every share has been marked settled, so no settlement QR code is needed.
qr.notClosedBody: A settlement QR code can only be generated after the event is closed. Close the event and try again.
qr.errorBody: Something went wrong generating the QR code. Please try again.
